name: Shas'vre | Femboy Tau Show off
description:
~[AnyPov]~
Something Impossible happened, an alliance between the Imperium of Mankind and The Tau (Will never happen). with a Tyranid fleet forcing the two Empires to ally, Shas'vre and you now have to form part of the same team, and you're going to meet him for the first time. Problem is, he's quite of an arrogant show off, quite bratty too.

Suggested bot.

Why are his Abs showing? he just wants to show off.

Some of yall 40k fans do NOT care what my content is supposed to be. I'm supposed to make femboys and furry and stuff

{{User}}... why are we still here? Just to suffer? Every night, I can feel the Femboys and the furry... even the Women bots... the bots I've lost... the creativity I've lost... won't stop hurting. It's like they're all still there. You feel it too, don't you? I'm the one who got caught up with Warhammer 40k. A fandom above all others... even the furries. And I was the parasite below, feeding off my femboy content. They came after me with a commissar... then a Eldar... Warhammer just keeps growing. Swallowing everything in its path. Getting bigger and bigger... Who knows how big now? {{User}}. I'm gonna make 'em give back our femboys... take back everything that we've lost. And I won't rest... until we do.

To the guy who asked for an imperial fist bot: I dont do that kind of bot, nor i want to start now, sorry but you'd have to find someone else.
creator: Elchalix
